health.title: Health Hub
health.subtitle: Sync health & match performance
health.nutrition.title: Nutrition Recommendations
health.nutrition.subtitle: Based on activity & stress in the last 24h.
health.nutrition.hydrationDesc: Add 750ml of coconut water or Oresol — training intensity is up 15% this week.
health.nutrition.magnesiumDesc: Stress is slightly elevated in the evenings — supplement Magnesium for better sleep.
health.nutrition.carbLoadingDesc: For tomorrow's match: prioritize slow carbs (oats, sweet potato).
health.nutrition.proteinDesc: After today's session: 30g of protein for muscle recovery.
health.devices.title: Smart Devices
health.devices.subtitle: Connect to auto-sync your metrics.
health.empty.signInRequired: Please sign in to track your health.
health.empty.noDataDesc: Log your activity to see your daily summary and trends.
health.empty.noLogsRange: No logs in this period yet.
health.log.title: Log today's activity
health.log.subtitle: Enter what you tracked. You can update this anytime today.
health.recovery.readyTip: HRV and sleep look great. Today is a good day for a hard match or training.
health.recovery.lightTip: Recovery is partial. Keep effort moderate and prioritize hydration & sleep tonight.
health.recovery.restTip: HRV and/or sleep are low. Skip hard sessions and focus on recovery today.
health.goals.title: Edit your goals
health.goals.subtitle: Personal targets for daily activity and weekly play.
health.nutrition.preMatchTip: Fuel up the day before and morning of a match. Slow carbs + steady hydration.
health.nutrition.postMatchTip: Refuel within 30–60 min after the match for best recovery.
health.nutrition.recoveryTip: Off-day or rest day — focus on anti-inflammatory foods and quality sleep.
health.nutrition.preFruitDesc: Banana or apple 60–90 min before play for quick energy.
health.nutrition.electrolytesDesc: Replenish sodium and potassium lost in sweat.
health.nutrition.recoverCarbDesc: Rice, pasta, or sweet potato to refill glycogen stores.
health.nutrition.antiInflamDesc: Berries, leafy greens, turmeric — support tissue recovery.
health.nutrition.omega3Desc: Salmon, walnuts, chia — reduces joint inflammation.
